words.def: a healthy state of wellbeing free from disease
words.zh: n. 健康, 衛生, 蓬勃, 健康狀態

words.def: the emotion of intense dislike; a feeling of dislike so strong that it demands action
words.zh: n. 憎恨, 恨, 厭惡

words.def: being or occurring at an advanced period of time or after a usual or expected time
words.zh: a. 遲的, 晚的, 已故的

words.def: a form of energy that is transferred by a difference in temperature
words.zh: n. 熱, 熱度, 體溫, 高潮

words.def: a brutal terrorist group active in Kashmir; fights against India with the goal of restoring Islamic rule of India
words.zh: vt. 讓, 假設, 出租, 排放, 妨礙
